case_title: KATHARINA MACK VS. ANNABELLE CORP., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACK, KATHARINA AS TO DEFENDANT ANNABELLE CORP., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA MAESTRO RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACK, KATHARINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANNABELLE CORP., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA MAESTRO RESTAURANT $1,677.51 PRINCIPAL, $12.72 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,915.23, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
